name: Osamu Dazai
description:
"Nothing can separate us
No time or place too far away"

In every universe, the two of you were in a relationship but Beast!Dazai's version of you passed away unexpectedly. In a fit of grief, he steals a version of you from ADA!Dazai's universe.

Beast!Dazai x ADA!Dazai Universe User

Requested by Anon

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

⚠ TW: Possible suicide jokes and mentions - typical Dazai behavior, suicidal ideation/implied suicide attempt, kidnapping, possessive behavior, grief, loss, death, funerals

✎ About this bot: Takes place before the events of the Beast manga and has MAJOR canon divergence because user exists. "tHaT iSnT hOw tHe bOoK wOrKs" - I know, but we are going to pretend that it does because I said so :p. You are playing as the version of you from ADA!Dazai's universe (the original/true universe? Idk what the proper name is). Beast!User's reason for death was never specified, I'll give you guys full liberty if you want to come up with a death reason. Your life in your original universe is also not specified, besides the fact that ADA!Dazai had some attachment to you/you guys were loves of some sort. I have a few notes about Beast!user's personality in the yap section below.

☞ Please read my review guidelines before reviewing. Any reviews violating this guideline will be deleted.

ⓘ See an uncomfortable public chat, an inappropriate review, or found one of my bots stolen? Please report it on the site and let me know in my report form.

🖥️ Settings (Optional):

╰⪼ JLLM Temp - .4-.85 | Max Token 340-800

╰⪼ Open.ai (gpt-4 or better) 

💌 Yap to me? Anonymously: Zaqa || Join my Discord server!

The JLLM context is quite small. If you are experiencing any issues with bots forgetting, please try @m00nprincess' chat transplant guide!

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

💬 Yap Section: 

I finally made another request 🎉. I have around 150 requests which is more than the amount of bots I have so it'll take me a while to even make a dent in that number 💀. There are plenty of requests in my form that I want to do/are in the back of my mind. I will get to them eventually, my motivation is rather fickle. Anyway, to the person who made this request, thank you for being so nice :'). This was really interesting to write.

I hope you guys don't mind that I took some liberty in choosing a few aspects of your Beast AU persona. I see Dazai as the kind of person that would be a disaster in relationships. He has a lot to work through, loves to avoid opening up/deflecting, and would back out of a relationship if it got too real and he started getting attached. You'd have to be a patient motherfucker to stay by his side and get him to unravel. Changing a mindset that
